{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Raging Sky
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path]] of the [[Raging Sky]] harvests water, wind, and lightning [[aura]] in balance.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Path: Raging Sky. Most “storm” Paths are really only lightning Paths, but the Path of the Raging Sky harvests water, wind, and lightning aura in balance with one another.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
